name: @feltpoker/local-server
description: Capacitor plugin: mDNS discovery + local WebSocket transport so every native peer runs its own LAN mesh endpoint (poker_app issue #28). Self-contained skeleton; native bodies are honest stubs with TODOs.

scripts.note: This is a skeleton. Wire into the app with `npm i` + `npx cap sync` from client/ once client/package.json and the native projects are owned by this workstream (they are edited by another agent this wave).
